code_example_rules: IMPORTANT: Include a dedicated section explaining the method chaining pattern.
must_include: View supports Fluent API through method chaining. All property setters return
View& (or the concrete subclass &) so they can be chained together.
Show declarative UI tree construction using Children({...}), AsInteractive(lambda),
preferred_terms: Always prefer chained initialization style over separate-statement style in examples.

extension_surfaces.reason: Used only when implementing custom View extensions.
